tags.name: mu-alert
tags.description:
Alert component for communicating feedback messages.
Uses role="alert" for error severity and role="status" for others.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-close** - Dispatched when the close button is clicked.

attributes.name: severity
attributes.description: Severity level controlling color, icon and ARIA role.

attributes.name: closeLabel
attributes.description:
When provided, renders a close button.
The button's aria-label is set to this value.

tags.name: mu-accordion-item
tags.description:
Individual accordion item with an expandable content region.
Managed by `mu-accordion`; can also be used standalone.
---


### **Events:**
 - **accordion-toggle** - Dispatched when the item expands or collapses. Detail: `{ expanded: boolean }`.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-accordion-divider-color** - Border colour between items; defaults to `--mu-divider` (#e0e0e0). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-accordion-header-color** - Text colour of the header; defaults to `--mu-text-primary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-accordion-content-color** - Text colour of the content area; defaults to `--mu-text-secondary`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **header** - The `<button>` element that acts as the expandable heading.
- **content** - The collapsible content region `div`.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Whether the content region is currently expanded.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the item is disabled.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Heading text displayed in the header button.

tags.name: mu-accordion
tags.description:
Accordion container that optionally enforces single-panel expansion.

Slotted children must be `mu-accordion-item` elements.
---

attributes.name: allowMultiple
attributes.description:
When true, multiple items may be expanded simultaneously.
When false (default), expanding one item collapses all others.

tags.name: mu-app-bar
tags.description:
Application top bar with three named slots: `start`, default, and `end`.
Renders as a sticky header.
---

attributes.name: elevation
attributes.description: Elevation level controlling box-shadow (0 = flat, 1 = default raised).

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Background color token or explicit CSS color.

attributes.name: fixed
attributes.description: Makes the app bar position:fixed so it stays at the top during scroll.

tags.name: mu-badge
tags.description:
A badge component to display status descriptors or unread counts.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-badge-bg** - Background colour; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-badge-color** - Text colour; defaults to `--mu-primary-contrast`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-badge-radius** - Border radius; defaults to 10 px for a pill shape. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **badge** - The badge bubble element positioned in the corner of its anchor.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: The content rendered within the badge.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color of the badge.

attributes.name: invisible
attributes.description: If true, the badge is hidden.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the badge content. Defaults to 'Badge: [content]'.

tags.name: mu-avatar
tags.description:
Minimal/MUI-style avatar component.
Can display an image or initials, supports size and color.
---

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Avatar image URL (optional).

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Alt text for the image (for accessibility).

attributes.name: initials
attributes.description: Fallback initials if no image.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Avatar size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.

tags.name: mu-breadcrumb-item
tags.description:
Individual breadcrumb item rendered as a list item.
Use inside a `mu-breadcrumb` container. Set `current` on the final item.
---

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: URL the breadcrumb navigates to. When omitted the item renders as plain text.

attributes.name: current
attributes.description:
When true marks this as the current page (aria-current="page").
The item is rendered without a link.

tags.name: mu-breadcrumb
tags.description:
Breadcrumb navigation container.
Wraps `mu-breadcrumb-item` elements in an accessible `nav > ol` structure.
---

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the nav landmark.

tags.name: mu-button
tags.description:
Minimal/MUI-style button component.
Supports 3 sizes, 3 types, and predefined colors.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-button-bg** - Background colour; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-button-color** - Text colour; defaults to `#fff` for contained variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-button-radius** - Border radius; falls back to `--mu-radius-md` (4 px). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-button-padding** - Internal block / inline padding; falls back to `--mu-spacing-2` / `--mu-spacing-4`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **button** - The inner `<button>` element.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Button size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Button variant: 'contained' | 'outlined' | 'icon'.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled state.

tags.name: mu-autocomplete
tags.description:
Autocomplete / combobox form component with filtering and keyboard navigation.
Participates natively in HTML forms.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when an option is selected. Detail: `{ value: string, label: string }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **input** - The text input element.
- **listbox** - The dropdown option list.
- **option** - Each individual option in the listbox.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Selected option value.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label displayed above the input.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Array of options to search.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the control.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Makes the field required for form validation.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text for the input.

attributes.name: minChars
attributes.description: Minimum number of characters before showing options.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

tags.name: mu-card
tags.description:
Card container component. Use slots for header, content, and actions.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-card-radius** - Border radius of the card; defaults to `--mu-radius-lg` (8 px). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-card-shadow** - Box shadow of the card; defaults to `--mu-elevation-1`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-card-padding** - Internal padding; defaults to `--mu-spacing`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **card** - The root layout div wrapping all card sections.
- **header** - The header section containing the `header` named slot.
- **content** - The body section containing the default slot.
- **actions** - The footer section containing the `actions` named slot.

tags.name: mu-card-header
tags.description:
Card header subcomponent. Use in the header slot of mu-card.
---

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Title text for the card header.

attributes.name: subtitle
attributes.description: Optional subtitle text.

tags.name: mu-card-content
tags.description:
Card content subcomponent. Use as the default slot of mu-card.
---

tags.name: mu-card-actions
tags.description:
Card actions subcomponent. Use in the actions slot of mu-card.
---

tags.name: mu-checkbox
tags.description:
Checkbox form component that participates in native HTML forms via ElementInternals.
Supports checked, indeterminate, and disabled states with full keyboard accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the checked state changes.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-checkbox-color** - Active (checked) fill and border colour; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-checkbox-radius** - Border radius of the box; defaults to 3 px. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **checkbox** - The focusable wrapper element that holds the visual box.
- **checkmark** - The inner box containing the SVG tick / dash mark.
- **label** - The visible label text element.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether the checkbox is checked.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: Tri-state: when true, overrides checked visually with a dash mark.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the checkbox, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name submitted with the form.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted to the form when checked.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label rendered next to the checkbox. Falls back to default slot.

tags.name: mu-chip-input
tags.description:
Input component that tokenises typed values into deletable chips.
Participates in native HTML forms via ElementInternals.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the chip array changes. Detail: `{ chips: string[] }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **container** - The flex wrapper around chips and the text input.
- **chip-text-input** - The inline text input field.

attributes.name: chips
attributes.description: Array of chip label strings currently displayed and submitted to the form.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input when no chips are present.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the component, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The form field name used when submitting.

tags.name: mu-chip
tags.description:
Chip component for tags, attributes, and actions.
---


### **Events:**
 - **delete** - Dispatched when the delete button is clicked on a deletable chip.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-chip-radius** - Border radius of the chip; defaults to 16 px. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-chip-height** - Height of the chip; defaults to 32 px. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-chip-bg** - Background colour for the default chip variant. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **chip** - The outer chip container element.
- **label** - The text label inside the chip.
- **delete-button** - The delete / close icon button (only present when `deletable`).

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Text label displayed in the chip.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the chip and its actions.

attributes.name: deletable
attributes.description: Allows the chip to be deleted, rendering a close icon.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color variant.

tags.name: mu-data-table
tags.description:
Data table component with sorting, row selection, and skeleton loading state.
Does not support virtualization in v1 — keep row count reasonable (< 1000).
---


### **Events:**
 - **sort-change** - Dispatched when sorting changes. Detail: `{ key: string, direction: SortDirection }`.
- **selection-change** - Dispatched when selection changes. Detail: `{ selected: number[] }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **table** - The `<table>` element.
- **head** - The `<thead>` element.
- **body** - The `<tbody>` element.
- **header-cell** - Each `<th>` in the header row.
- **cell** - Each `<td>` in a data row.
- **row** - Each `<tr>` in the body.
- **row--selected-** - Applied to selected rows.

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: Array of column definitions.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Array of row data objects.

attributes.name: sortKey
attributes.description: Key of the currently sorted column, or empty string for none.

attributes.name: sortDirection
attributes.description: Current sort direction.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Enables row selection via checkboxes.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Shows skeleton loading rows instead of actual data.

attributes.name: skeletonRows
attributes.description: Number of skeleton rows to display when loading.

tags.name: mu-divider
tags.description:
Divider component to separate content.
---

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The orientation of the divider.

tags.name: mu-dialog
tags.description:
Modal dialog overlay using the native <dialog> element.
Manages focus on open/close, traps focus inside, and closes on Escape.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-open** - Dispatched when the dialog finishes opening.
- **mu-close** - Dispatched when the dialog closes (any cause).

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-dialog-radius** - Border radius of the dialog panel; defaults to `--mu-radius-xl` (12 px). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-dialog-shadow** - Box shadow of the dialog; defaults to `--mu-elevation-2`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-dialog-max-width** - Maximum width of the dialog; defaults to `min(560px, 90vw)`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **dialog** - The native `<dialog>` element.
- **header** - The `<h2>` headline element at the top of the dialog.
- **content** - The scrollable content area containing the default slot.
- **actions** - The footer actions area containing the `actions` named slot.
- **close-button** - The × icon button in the top-right corner.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the dialog is currently open. Reflected to attribute.

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: Text rendered as the dialog headline / title.

attributes.name: fullscreen
attributes.description: Expands the dialog to fill the full viewport.

attributes.name: scrollable
attributes.description: Makes the dialog content area scrollable when content overflows.

tags.name: mu-drawer
tags.description:
Side drawer that slides in from the left or right edge of the viewport.
Uses a native `<dialog>` element for focus trapping and Escape handling.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-open** - Dispatched after the drawer opens.
- **mu-close** - Dispatched after the drawer closes.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the drawer is visible. Reflects to attribute.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Side from which the drawer slides in.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width of the drawer panel (any valid CSS length value).

tags.name: mu-locale-provider
tags.description:
Locale provider component that supplies a `MuLocale` object to all
descendant components via the Lit Context API.
When no provider is present in the tree, components fall back to
`defaultLocale` (English).
---

tags.name: mu-file-upload
tags.description:
File upload form component with drag-and-drop support.
Participates natively in HTML forms.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-change** - Dispatched when files are selected. Detail: `{ files: FileList }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **dropzone** - The clickable drop zone container.
- **dropzone--active** - Applied to the drop zone when a file is dragged over.
- **label** - The main label text inside the drop zone.
- **hint** - The secondary hint text inside the drop zone.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allows selection of multiple files.

attributes.name: accept
attributes.description: MIME type accept string (e.g. `image/*,.pdf`).

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the file upload control.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Primary label text shown inside the drop zone.

attributes.name: dragLabel
attributes.description: Secondary hint text shown below the label.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

tags.name: mu-icon
tags.description:
Material Icon wrapper component.
Supports size and color props.
---

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Icon name (Material Icons font ligature).

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Icon size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | number (px).

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.

tags.name: mu-linear-progress
tags.description:
Linear progress bar component.
Supports determinate (value-based) and indeterminate (animated) modes.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-complete** - Dispatched when value reaches 100 in determinate mode.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Progress value from 0 to 100.
Ignored when `indeterminate` is true.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Stroke/fill color of the progress bar. Accepts any valid CSS color.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: When true the bar animates indefinitely instead of showing a fixed value.

tags.name: mu-list-item
tags.description:
List item component to be used inside mu-list.
---

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: If true, the list item is disabled.

tags.name: mu-list
tags.description:
List component for continuous vertical indexes.
---

attributes.name: dense
attributes.description: Enables dense mode (reduces padding).

tags.name: mu-menu-item
tags.description:
Individual menu item used inside `mu-menu`.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-select** - Dispatched when the item is selected. Detail: `{ label: string }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **item** - The root button element of the menu item.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Text label displayed in the menu item.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the menu item, preventing selection.

tags.name: mu-menu
tags.description:
Dropdown menu component with keyboard navigation and accessible focus management.
Place `mu-menu-item` elements in the default slot.
Use the `trigger` slot for the element that opens the menu.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-open** - Dispatched when the menu opens.
- **mu-close** - Dispatched when the menu closes.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **menu** - The outer container of the floating list.
- **list** - The `ul` element holding menu items.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Controls the open/close state of the menu.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Preferred placement of the menu relative to the trigger.

tags.name: mu-pagination
tags.description:
Pagination component for navigating through pages of content.
Emits a `page-change` event when a page button or prev/next is clicked.
---


### **Events:**
 - **page-change** - Detail: `{ page: number }`.

attributes.name: count
attributes.description: Total number of pages.

attributes.name: page
attributes.description: Currently active page (1-based).

attributes.name: siblingCount
attributes.description: Number of sibling pages shown on each side of the current page.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether to disable all navigation controls.

tags.name: mu-popover
tags.description:
Floating popover component with focus management and accessible markup.
Attach a trigger element via the `trigger` slot.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-open** - Dispatched when the popover opens.
- **mu-close** - Dispatched when the popover closes.

### **Methods:**
 - **openPopover(): _void_** - Opens the popover, positions it, and moves focus to the first focusable child.
- **closePopover(): _void_** - Closes the popover and restores focus to the trigger.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **content** - The floating content container.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Controls the open/close state of the popover.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Preferred placement of the popover relative to the trigger.

attributes.name: closeOnOutsideClick
attributes.description: When true, clicking outside the popover closes it.

attributes.name: popoverrole
attributes.description: ARIA role applied to the content container.

tags.name: mu-radio-group
tags.description:
Radio group container that wraps `mu-radio` elements.
Provides `role="radiogroup"` and an accessible group label.
---

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the radio group, referenced by aria-labelledby.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the control as required — at least one radio must be selected.

tags.name: mu-radio
tags.description:
Radio button form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Use inside a `mu-radio-group` for proper grouping and roving tabindex.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when this radio becomes selected.

### **Methods:**
 - **focus(): _void_** - Focuses the host element's inner ripple span.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether this radio button is selected.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the radio button, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name used to group radio buttons.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted to the form when this radio is selected.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label rendered next to the radio button. Falls back to default slot.

tags.name: mu-rating
tags.description:
Star rating form component.
Supports half-star precision, read-only mode, and full keyboard navigation.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the rating value changes. Detail: `{ value: number }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **star** - Each individual star wrapper span.
- **star--filled** - Applied to fully filled stars.
- **star--empty** - Applied to empty stars.
- **star--partial-** - Applied to partial/half stars.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current rating value.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum number of stars to display.

attributes.name: precision
attributes.description: Precision of allowed values. Use 1 for whole stars, 0.5 for half stars.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: When true, the rating is display-only and cannot be changed.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the rating control.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the radiogroup.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

tags.name: mu-select
tags.description:
Select (dropdown) form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Uses a native `<select>` inside shadow DOM for maximum accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the selected value changes.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-select-radius** - Border radius of the select element; defaults to `--mu-radius` (8 px). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-select-border-color** - Default border colour; defaults to `--mu-divider`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-select-focus-color** - Border and ring colour on focus; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **label** - The `<label>` element displayed above the select.
- **select** - The native `<select>` element.
- **error** - The error message element displayed below the field.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Currently selected value; a string array when multiple is true.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Floating label displayed above the select.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the select, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required in form validation.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Validation error message. Non-empty string triggers error styling.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Array of options to render in the dropdown.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown as the first unselectable option.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Enables multi-select mode; value becomes string[].

tags.name: mu-skeleton
tags.description:
Skeleton placeholder component used to preview content shape before loading.
Renders a pulsing or waving animated placeholder with configurable shape and size.
---

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Shape variant of the skeleton.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width of the skeleton element (any valid CSS length value).

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Height of the skeleton element (any valid CSS length value).

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: Animation style; set to false to disable animation.

tags.name: mu-slider
tags.description:
Range slider form element that participates in native HTML forms.
Supports keyboard navigation, pointer drag, and full accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the value changes. Detail: `{ value: number }`.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **track** - The background track element.
- **fill** - The filled portion of the track representing the current value.
- **thumb** - The draggable circular handle.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current numeric value of the slider.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum allowed value.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum allowed value.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: Step increment for keyboard and pointer movement.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the slider, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label text for the slider.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name submitted with the form.

tags.name: mu-snackbar
tags.description:
Snackbar notification component rendered in a fixed bottom-center position.
Auto-dismisses after the configured duration; duration=0 is persistent.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-close** - Dispatched when the snackbar is dismissed (any cause).
- **mu-action** - Dispatched when the action button is clicked.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-snackbar-bg** - Background colour; defaults to `--mu-text-primary` (#212b36). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-snackbar-radius** - Border radius; defaults to `--mu-radius-lg` (8 px). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-snackbar-shadow** - Box shadow; defaults to `--mu-elevation-2`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **snackbar** - The container div for the snackbar notification.
- **message** - The text message span inside the snackbar.
- **action** - The optional call-to-action button.
- **close-button** - The dismiss (×) icon button.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Notification message text.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual severity variant controlling colours and ARIA live region urgency.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. Use 0 for a persistent snackbar.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the snackbar is currently visible. Reflected to attribute.

attributes.name: action-label
attributes.description: Optional label for the call-to-action button. Hidden when empty.

tags.name: mu-spinner
tags.description:
Circular progress indicator rendered as an SVG.
Supports both indeterminate (spinning) and determinate (percentage) modes.
---

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Named size of the spinner.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Stroke color of the spinning arc. Accepts any valid CSS color value.

attributes.name: value
indeterminate
attributes.description: Whether to spin indefinitely regardless of `value`.

tags.name: mu-step
tags.description:
Individual step used inside `mu-stepper`.
Displays a step indicator with a label and optional content slot.
---


### **CSS Parts:**
 - **indicator** - The circular step indicator.
- **label** - The step label text.
- **content** - The slot container for step content.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Descriptive label shown next to the indicator.

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: Visual and semantic state of the step.

attributes.name: index
attributes.description: 1-based index assigned by the parent stepper.

tags.name: mu-stepper
tags.description:
Step-by-step progress indicator component.
Accepts `mu-step` elements as children to define each step.
---


### **Events:**
 - **step-change** - Dispatched when the active step changes. Detail: `{ from: number, to: number }`.

### **Methods:**
 - **goTo(toIndex: _number_): _void_** - Navigates to the given step index if allowed.
- **next(): _void_** - Advances to the next step.
- **back(): _void_** - Returns to the previous step.

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **connector** - The line connecting two adjacent steps.

attributes.name: activeStep
attributes.description: Index (0-based) of the currently active step.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Layout orientation of the stepper.

attributes.name: linear
attributes.description: When true, steps can only be activated in sequence.

tags.name: mu-switch
tags.description:
Toggle switch form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Supports checked, disabled states and full keyboard accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the switch is toggled.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-switch-color** - Track colour when the switch is on; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-switch-radius** - Border radius of the track; defaults to 14 px. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **track** - The sliding track element (the pill shape).
- **thumb** - The circular thumb that slides inside the track.
- **label** - The visible label text element.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether the switch is in the on/checked state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the switch, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name submitted with the form.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted to the form when the switch is on.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label rendered next to the switch. Falls back to default slot.

tags.name: mu-tab-panel
tags.description:
Content panel associated with a `mu-tab`.
Visibility is managed by `mu-tabs`; do not use standalone.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-tab-panel-padding** - Padding inside the panel; defaults to 16 px. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **tab-panel** - The `div[role="tabpanel"]` element.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Whether this panel is currently visible.

attributes.name: labelledby
attributes.description: ID of the `mu-tab` that controls this panel.

tags.name: mu-tab
tags.description:
Individual tab button inside a `mu-tabs` container.
Managed by `mu-tabs`; do not use standalone.
---


### **Events:**
 - **tab-select**

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-tab-color** - Text colour of the inactive tab; defaults to `--mu-text-secondary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-tab-indicator-color** - Active tab indicator and text colour; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **tab** - The `<button>` element that acts as the tab trigger.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Whether this tab is currently the selected one.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the tab is disabled.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description:
ID of the `mu-tab-panel` this tab controls.
Set automatically by `mu-tabs`.

tags.name: mu-tabs
tags.description:
Tabs container that manages selection and keyboard navigation across
slotted `mu-tab` and `mu-tab-panel` children.
---


### **Events:**
 - **tab-change** - Dispatched when the selected tab index changes. Detail: `{ index: number }`.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-tabs-indicator-color** - Active tab indicator and text colour; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-tabs-divider-color** - Bottom border colour of the tab list; defaults to `--mu-divider`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **tab-list** - The `div[role="tablist"]` container element.

attributes.name: selectedIndex
attributes.description: Zero-based index of the currently selected tab.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
Layout orientation of the tab list.
`vertical` places the tab list beside the panels in a row layout.

attributes.name: scrollable
attributes.description:
Enables horizontal scroll overflow on the tab list and shows
scroll-indicator chevron buttons at each end when overflow is present.

tags.name: mu-text-field
tags.description:
Single-line text input form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Wraps a native `<input>` inside shadow DOM with an accessible floating label.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the input loses focus with a changed value.
- **input** - Dispatched on every keystroke (native input event forwarded).

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-text-field-radius** - Border radius of the input element; defaults to `--mu-radius` (8 px). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-text-field-border-color** - Default border colour; defaults to `--mu-divider`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-text-field-focus-color** - Border and ring colour on focus; defaults to `--mu-primary`. _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **label** - The `<label>` element displayed above the input.
- **wrapper** - The flex wrapper that holds prefix slot, input, and suffix slot.
- **input** - The native `<input>` or `<textarea>` element.
- **helper** - The helper text element displayed below the field.
- **error** - The error message element displayed below the field.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current value of the input field.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Floating label displayed above the input when focused or filled.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input when empty.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML input type controlling keyboard, validation, and rendering.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the text field, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Makes the text field read-only.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required in form validation.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Validation error message. Non-empty string triggers error styling.

attributes.name: helper-text
attributes.description: Secondary descriptive text shown below the input when no error is present.

attributes.name: multiline
attributes.description: Renders a multi-line textarea instead of a single-line input.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Visible row count when multiline is true.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: Maximum character count. Used with showCharCount to render a counter.

attributes.name: showCharCount
attributes.description: Displays a character counter below the field when maxlength is finite.

tags.name: mu-theme-provider
tags.description:
Theme provider component that applies design tokens to its DOM subtree.
Wrap your application root or a section of UI with this element to enable
theming. Switches between light and dark token sets via the `mode` property.

CSS custom properties are applied directly to the host element's inline style,
so they cascade through both light DOM children and shadow roots of
descendant components.
---

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Active color scheme. Switches between the light and dark token sets.

tags.name: mu-tooltip
tags.description:
Tooltip overlay component that reveals a short label near a trigger element.
Displays on hover and keyboard focus with a 300 ms delay.
Uses the Popover API (popover="manual") for top-layer rendering where supported.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--mu-tooltip-bg** - Background colour of the tooltip; defaults to `--mu-text-primary` (#212b36). _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-tooltip-color** - Text colour; defaults to `#fff`. _(default: undefined)_
- **--mu-tooltip-radius** - Border radius; defaults to `--mu-radius-md` (4 px). _(default: undefined)_

### **CSS Parts:**
 - **tooltip** - The tooltip bubble element.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Text content of the tooltip.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Side of the trigger on which the tooltip appears.

tags.name: mu-typography
tags.description:
A typography component that ensures semantic HTML tags and consistent styling.
---

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The typography variant which determines the semantic HTML tag and visual style.
